scope: VULCA Solution Pack v1 master PDF pages 7-12 component preview
external_use_boundary: Do not use raw source crops in an external PDF unless cleared.
Redraw, mask, or crop annotated-safe before external use.
Do not include raw local paths, filenames, capture-batch ids, or source-log filenames in customer-facing copy.
Named companies are public market examples only, not customer relationships or audit targets.
confirmed_review_decisions: Keep PROYA as the Lane A public market example.
Use neutral field-completion and owner-route language on customer-visible evidence cards instead of severity scoring.
Frame Lane B as Seedream / BytePlus public model context without selecting a specific model version in customer-facing copy.
Move Kling out of the customer-facing Lane B page; retain it only as an internal video/reference reserve.
Keep the Creatify / Alibaba case study as internal reference by default; do not use it as customer-facing visual proof.
Company names may appear only as public examples, never as customers, partners, endorsers, or audit targets.

pages.title: Lane A: Product-truth and claim evidence
Evidence pattern: claim, source, representation, owner
pages.customer_copy_decision: Use field-completion and owner-route language; do not use severity scoring.

pages.title: Lane B: AI publishability and generated asset context
pages.customer_copy_decision: Use version-neutral public model context; Kling is internal video/reference reserve only.

pages.title: Evidence pattern: input, output, label, owner
pages.customer_copy_decision: Use review-packet and owner-route language; do not use severity scoring.

source_crops.role: primary model/version and output-format source record

pages.title: Lane C: AI ad workflow and creative automation evidence
pages.customer_copy_decision: Use Creatify URL-to-video as a public workflow example; keep Alibaba case-study material internal by default.

internal_reference_crops.role: Alibaba case-study source context; internal reference only by default

pages.title: Evidence pattern: workflow step, source, review context, handoff
pages.customer_copy_decision: Use review/result context and owner-route wording; keep Alibaba result-strip crop internal unless explicitly approved; do not use severity scoring.

source_crops.role: product-link to generated-ad workflow source record

internal_reference_crops.role: Alibaba case-study reported result strip; internal reference only by default
